Hossam Zaki is a Full Stack Java Developer with contact information including email, phone number, GitHub, LinkedIn, and personal website.

Hossam Zaki completed his education with an M.C.A in January 2018 from Pune University, a B.C.A in January 2015 from Amravati University, an H.S.C in January 2012 from Amravati University, and an S.S.C in January 2010 from Amravati University.
From July 2018 to June 2020, Hossam Zaki worked as a Full Stack Java Developer at Salcluster Technologies LLP, developing 3 projects using Java Servlet, JSP, Ajax, and other web technologies.

From January 2021 to May 2021, Hossam Zaki was a Software Developer at OmegaSoft Technologies Pvt. Ltd., developing project modules using Java Spring, Hibernate, AngularJs, Ajax, KendoUI, and Bootstrap.
Hossam Zaki developed a GST And Sales Billing Software in 1.5 months using Java, JavaScript, Jquery, Ajax, and MySQL, implementing functionalities like GST Billing and invoice generation.
Hossam Zaki created a Dinman News website in 1 month using Java, JavaScript, Jquery, Ajax, and MySQL, enabling online display of video and text news.
Hossam Zaki designed an Agri Management Website in 1.5 months using Java, JavaScript, Jquery, Ajax, and MySQL, facilitating the buying and selling of vegetables across India.

Hossam Zaki built a client’s website for posting newspapers all over India in 4 months using Java, Spring, Hibernate, AngularJs, Ajax, and MySQL, integrating 12 modules including an Admin Panel and E-paper Posting.

Hossam Zaki engineered a lightweight website using MVC and Service based Architecture, supporting advertisement posting and direct social media sharing, and implemented a comprehensive Payment module allowing online transactions via debit/credit cards and E-Wallets.
Hossam Zaki holds a Java Developer Certificate from Unanth Technical Institute, a Java Certificate from SoloLearn, and a Command line crash Course certificate from Udemy.

Hossam Zaki's skills include Programming Languages (Java), Web Technology (HTML5, CSS3, Bootstrap, JavaScript, JQuery, Ajax, AngularJs), Database (MySQL), and IDE and Tools (Eclipse, Spring Tool Suite, NetBeans, Sublime Te).
The text lists 'txt' and 'Atom' as items.
The operating systems listed are Windows XP, 7, 8, and 10.

Java is a versatile and robust workhorse in the digital world, a favored tool for bringing ambitious projects to life. Often found in the hands of developers like Hossam Zaki, it’s a language capable of powering everything from practical business solutions to dynamic online platforms. Zaki, for instance, swiftly constructed a GST and Sales Billing Software with Java as a core component, streamlining invoice generation and financial management in just a month and a half. 

It’s a language equally at home building engaging public-facing applications; Zaki leveraged Java to create the Dinman News website, a platform for delivering video and text news content.  Its adaptability extends to complex logistical systems too, as demonstrated by the Agri Management Website Zaki designed, connecting vegetable vendors across India. 

Java isn’t limited to smaller-scale endeavors. It readily scales to support substantial projects, evidenced by Zaki’s four-month undertaking – a comprehensive website for nationwide newspaper distribution, boasting twelve integrated modules and a robust admin panel.  

Frequently paired with technologies like JavaScript, JQuery, Ajax, MySQL, Spring, Hibernate, and AngularJs, Java demonstrates a collaborative spirit, seamlessly integrating with other tools to achieve optimal results.  It’s a language favored for its reliability and the extensive ecosystem of support available, making it a cornerstone of Zaki’s skillset and a powerful engine for innovation.

Hossam Zaki is a resourceful and rapidly developing Full Stack Java Developer, equipped with a solid academic foundation – an M.C.A from Pune University following a B.C.A and earlier schooling from Amravati University. He’s a pragmatic builder, demonstrated through a portfolio of projects ranging from practical business solutions to dynamic web platforms. 

His professional journey began at Salcluster Technologies LLP, where he honed his skills with Java Servlet, JSP, and Ajax between 2018 and 2020. He then moved to OmegaSoft Technologies Pvt. Ltd., expanding his toolkit to include Java Spring, Hibernate, AngularJs, and Bootstrap. 

Zaki doesn’t just implement; he conceives and delivers. He’s the architect behind a GST and Sales Billing Software, a news website – Dinman News – and an Agri Management Website designed to connect farmers across India. Notably, he spearheaded the development of a comprehensive website for newspaper posting, integrating twelve modules including an admin panel and e-paper functionality. He favors a lightweight, MVC and service-based architecture, and understands the importance of modern features like payment gateway integration. 

Driven by continuous learning, Zaki holds certifications in Java development and command line proficiency. His technical expertise encompasses Java, HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, JQuery, Ajax, AngularJs, MySQL, and a range of IDEs including Eclipse and Spring Tool Suite. He maintains an active online presence through his email, GitHub, LinkedIn, and personal website, signaling a proactive approach to networking and professional growth.

Ajax is a versatile and frequently employed web technology, a cornerstone in the toolkit of developer Hossam Zaki. Not a standalone entity itself, but a powerful technique, Ajax consistently appears alongside Zaki’s projects – from the practical GST and Sales Billing Software to the dynamic Dinman News website and the nationwide Agri Management Website. It’s a key ingredient in bringing interactivity to web applications, enabling features like responsive updates and seamless data exchange without full page reloads. Zaki demonstrates proficiency in utilizing Ajax alongside Java, JavaScript, JQuery, and MySQL, consistently integrating it into both front-end and back-end development. He’s leveraged its capabilities to build robust systems, including a comprehensive newspaper posting website with a twelve-module structure and admin panel, showcasing its adaptability across diverse project scales. Essentially, Ajax, in Zaki’s hands, is the silent engine powering a more fluid and engaging user experience.

MySQL is a robust and versatile database management system, a quiet workhorse powering a surprising range of digital endeavors. It isn’t flashy, but it’s *reliable* – the foundation upon which developer Hossam Zaki has repeatedly built functional and impactful applications. Think of it as the meticulous record-keeper, diligently storing and organizing the data that brings ideas to life. 

Zaki favors MySQL as the backbone for his projects, from the practical necessities of a GST and Sales Billing Software – ensuring accurate financial tracking – to the dynamic world of online news with the Dinman News website, handling both text and video content. It’s equally at home managing the logistical complexities of an Agri Management Website, connecting buyers and sellers of produce across India, and supporting the extensive features of a newspaper posting platform with a dozen integrated modules. 

MySQL isn’t just a tool for Zaki; it’s a core skill, a fundamental element in his toolkit alongside Java, JavaScript, and other web technologies. It’s the silent partner in his ability to translate concepts into working software, providing the structured storage needed for everything from invoices and news articles to agricultural transactions and digital newspapers. It’s a testament to its adaptability that MySQL consistently appears in Zaki’s diverse portfolio, proving its worth as a dependable and scalable solution for a variety of web-based applications.
